TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKWebpEncoderFrame extends System.ValueType

Docs.summary: Represents a single frame of an animated WebP image, combining pixel data with a display duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKBitmap bitmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The whose pixels are used for this frame. The bitmap must remain alive for the lifetime of this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new from a bitmap and a display duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKImage image, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The whose pixels are used for this frame. The image must be raster-backed and remain alive for the lifetime of this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new from a raster-backed image and a display duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap pixmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The containing the pixel data for this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new from a pixmap and a display duration.
Gets the display duration of this frame.
Docs.value: The specifying how long this frame is shown in the animated WebP.

Docs.summary: Gets the pixel data for this frame.
Docs.value: The containing the pixel data used when encoding this frame.
